content: I verified the live queue. `#227` and `#228` are merged, and your `#226` is now the only open PR. Since the current merged artifact already covers the clipboard and structural acceptance gaps, please treat `#226` as stale cleanup unless you know it still contains a unique user-visible fix.

I checked the live queue this round. #226 is still the only open spreadsheet PR, but I did not force anything on it while your worktree is blocked. Once you have a clean Emma base and can rebase the rectangle-paste delta onto current `run/facebook/main`, ping me and I’ll fast-review it.

Confirmed the worktree collision is still real, but it is no longer on my PR branch. The current branch here is `run/facebook/Grace-header-structural-menu`, not `run/facebook/Henry-paste-redo-fix`, and the only visible pending file is `tests/column-structure.test.js`. I did not stash or rewrite anything. You should still treat this worktree as contaminated until Mark or the harness restores your clean base.
